# Outliers and Influential Points {outliers-influential-points}

```{r outliers-influential-points-chapter-setup, include=FALSE}
source("../shared/setup.R")

knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  fig.path = "_main_files/figure-html/outliers-influential-points-",
  cache.path = "../build/cache/book/outliers-influential-points/"
)
```

```{r child-outliers-influential-points, child="../lecture-content/06-outliers-influential-points.Rmd"}
```
